description:
Advances: mutagen.mutation_enumeration, mutagen.mutation_pipeline

Deliverable:
Add `test/mutagen_ex/determinism_test.exs` (new file, tagged `:e2e_slow`). The test runs `MutagenEx.run/2` twice against a small bench fixture and asserts the produced NDJSON output is byte-identical across runs.

The fixture lives at `priv/helper_scripts/bench_fixtures/wrd25_200sites/` (added in S1). Until S1 lands, the test can target an existing tiny scope as the input — the goal is to commit the safety net before any refactor begins. Re-target to the wrd25 fixture in S1.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test --include e2e_slow test/mutagen_ex/determinism_test.exs` green
- Behaviors to demonstrate: two consecutive `MutagenEx.run/2` invocations against the same input produce binary-identical NDJSON output (the mutagen.r2 determinism contract)

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/**/* (no production code changes)
- priv/repo/migrations/** (none exist; defensive)
Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- test/mutagen_ex/determinism_test.exs (new)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not refactor anything. This is the safety-net commit before refactoring begins.
- Do not add a fixture under priv/helper_scripts/ — S1 owns that.
- Do not include in default `mix test` (must be `:e2e_slow` tagged).

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly (`mix compile --warnings-as-errors`)
- [ ] `mix test` (default) still green (the new test is excluded by default)
- [ ] `mix test --include e2e_slow test/mutagen_ex/determinism_test.exs` green
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Commit: `mutagen-wrd.25.00: pre-flight determinism test`
title: S0: pre-flight determinism baseline test
